clips.prompt: Hero product shot — dramatic studio lighting, dark background, product centered with premium feel, shallow depth of field
Product in use — lifestyle moment, warm natural light, authentic environment, person interacting with the product
Detail close-up — macro photography showing texture, quality, and craftsmanship of the product
Flat lay arrangement — top-down editorial styling with the product and complementary props on a clean surface
Aspirational lifestyle shot — the product as part of a desirable moment, cinematic wide framing, golden hour light
